title: Microwave Technology Notes
subtitle: study notes for the course of Fundamentals of Microwave Technology
summary: A series of study notes when I was preparing for the finals for the course of Fundamentals of Microwave Technology during my junior year. There were no such notes for this topic online since it was very niche, so my notes were widely read.

blocks.text: It was purely for passing the finals and I did not continue to do any further research or study over the microwave technology. I had to admit that it was interesting to me, but I did not feel like diving into too hardware heavy stuff.

items: [传输线理论-微波技术基础复习笔记(一)](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/67811969)
